title.en: Why are World Cup underdogs doing so well?
title.zh-CN: 为什么世界杯失败者表现如此出色？

summary.en: Are the surprise results achieved by lower-ranked teams in the World Cup a matter of luck - or clever planning and execution?
summary.zh-CN: 排名较低的球队在世界杯上取得的惊人成绩是运气问题还是巧妙的规划和执行问题？

title.en: The 0-0 draw that highlighted flaw in World Cup format
title.zh-CN: 0-0平局突出了世界杯格式的缺陷

summary.en: Doubts rise over the World Cup's format as the first of the two group games that give the two teams a chance to progress with a draw finishes 0-0.
summary.zh-CN: 作为两场小组赛中的第一场比赛，两支球队有机会以0-0的平局取得进展，对世界杯的格式产生了怀疑。

title.en: Mbappe v Haaland: Who is more important for their country?
title.zh-CN: 姆巴佩诉哈兰德：谁对他们的国家更重要？

summary.en: Two of the greatest forwards in world football will go head-to-head at Boston Stadium on Friday, as France and Kylian Mbappe take on Norway and Erling Haaland.
summary.zh-CN: 世界足球界最伟大的两位前锋将于周五在波士顿体育场迎头赶上，法国和Kylian Mbappe将迎战挪威和Erling Haaland。

title.en: Beccacece goes from brink to World Cup history with Ecuador
title.zh-CN: 与厄瓜多尔一起探索贝卡塞斯的世界杯历史

summary.en: Sebastian Beccacece was on the verge of losing his job as Ecuador head coach as the clock ticked down against Germany - now he has a last-32 match to look forward to.
summary.zh-CN: 塞巴斯蒂安·贝卡塞斯（ Sebastian Beccacece ）在对阵德国的比赛中即将失去厄瓜多尔主教练的职位-现在他有最后一场32场比赛值得期待。

title.en: US interested in hosting 2038 World Cup - Giuliani
title.zh-CN: 美国有兴趣主办2038年世界杯-朱利安尼

summary.en: The United States could consider making a bid to host the men's 2038 World Cup, with Fifa considering expanding the tournament to 64 teams.
summary.zh-CN: 美国可以考虑申办男子2038年世界杯，国际足联考虑将比赛扩大到64支球队。

title.en: Japan and Sweden draw takes both into last 32
title.zh-CN: 日本和瑞典平局都进入了最后32名

summary.en: Daizen Maeda's smart finish to Japan's team goal is cancelled out by Anthony Elanga's long-range strike as Sweden fight back in a 1-1 draw that takes both sides through to the World Cup knockout...
summary.zh-CN: 前田大全（ Daizen Maeda ）对日本队进球的聪明成绩被安东尼·埃兰加（ Anthony Elanga ）的长程罢工所抵消，因为瑞典以1-1平局反击，将双方带入世界杯淘汰赛......

title.en: 'We could call it racist' - Ivory Coast boss sad at Schweinsteiger comments
title.zh-CN: “我们可以称之为种族主义” -科特迪瓦老板在Schweinsteiger的评论中伤心

summary.en: Ivory Coast boss Emerse Fae says comments from ex-Germany midfielder Bastian Schweinsteiger about their "wild" playing style could be considered racist.
summary.zh-CN: 科特迪瓦老板Emerse Fae表示，前德国中场球员Bastian Schweinsteiger关于他们“狂野”比赛风格的评论可能被认为是种族主义者。

title.en: What each team need to reach World Cup knockouts
title.zh-CN: 每支球队进入世界杯淘汰赛所需的条件

summary.en: With the final round of group fixtures under way the path to the World Cup final on 19 July is starting to take shape.
summary.zh-CN: 随着最后一轮小组赛的举行，通往7月19日世界杯决赛的道路开始成形。

title.en: 'Oh my word!' - Elanga 'stunner' draws Sweden level
title.zh-CN: “哦，我的天！” - Elanga的“stunner”吸引了瑞典的水平

summary.en: Anthony Elanga scores a brilliant curling effort from the edge of the area to draw Sweden level with Japan in their FIFA World Cup Group F match at Dallas Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 安东尼·埃兰加（ Anthony Elanga ）在达拉斯体育场（ Dallas Stadium ）举行的国际足联世界杯F组比赛中，从该地区的边缘进行了精彩的冰壶比赛，将瑞典与日本拉平。

title.en: Hearts' Braga plays down transfer talk - gossip

summary.en: Hearts striker says sole focus is on Champions League qualifying despite links to France as Celtic are set to end long negotiations with coaching staff...
summary.zh-CN: Hearts前锋表示，尽管凯尔特人队将结束与教练组的漫长谈判，但他们唯一关注的是冠军联赛资格赛，尽管他们与法国有联系……

title.en: Elanga earns Sweden spot in World Cup knockouts with Japan draw
title.zh-CN: Elanga凭借日本平局在世界杯淘汰赛中赢得瑞典席位

summary.en: Anthony Elanga's stunning equaliser booked Sweden's spot in the World Cup knockout stages after a 1-1 draw with Japan, who also go through as the second-placed team in Group F.
summary.zh-CN: 安东尼·埃兰加（ Anthony Elanga ）令人惊叹的均衡器在与日本队1-1平局后，在世界杯淘汰赛阶段获得了瑞典队的位置，日本队也是F组中排名第二的球队。

title.en: Netherlands claim Group F top spot with win over Tunisia
title.zh-CN: 荷兰以击败突尼斯夺得F组榜首

summary.en: Netherlands secured top spot in Group F with a comprehensive 3-1 win over Tunisia.
summary.zh-CN: 荷兰以3比1全面战胜突尼斯，夺得F组冠军。

title.en: Mbappe vs Haaland - new Messi-Ronaldo rivalry graces World Cup
title.zh-CN: 姆巴佩vs哈兰德-新的梅西-罗纳尔多的竞争为世界杯增光添彩

summary.en: It is a World Cup where the big stars have shone so far. On Friday night, two of those big hitters are set to do battle in the first 'clash of the titans' meeting.
summary.zh-CN: 这是迄今为止大明星闪耀的世界杯。星期五晚上，其中两名大型击球手将在第一次“巨人冲突”会议上进行战斗。

title.en: The World Cup 'Pride Match' - concern, complaints and the hope of 'unity'
title.zh-CN: 世界杯“骄傲赛” --关注、抱怨和“团结”的希望

summary.en: When Seattle announced it would host a Pride Match during the 2026 World Cup, it was long before the draw had even been made.
summary.zh-CN: 当西雅图宣布将在2026年世界杯期间举办一场骄傲赛时，距离抽签还差很长时间。
